title: Kimberly Lennon
content:
People.ContactEmail klennon@mccarthy.ca
Kimberly Lennon is an associate lawyer in the firm’s Labour and Employment Group in Toronto. She is committed to fostering positive and trusting client relationships while providing practical and business-minded advice.
Kimberly’s practice focuses on providing advice and representation to private and public sector employers in all areas of workplace law. Kimberly has provided advice on a range of areas including human rights, grievance arbitrations, collective bargaining, wrongful dismissal, employment standards, employment contracts, workplace policies and workplace investigations.
Prior to pursuing law school, she attended Brock University and graduated with a degree in Sport Management. Kimberly later earned her law degree from the Bora Laskin Faculty of Law at Lakehead University and was called to the Bar in 2021. Kimberly is a member of the Law Society of Ontario."
